title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Mahindra Finance Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Mahindra Finance Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, Mahindra Finance Advisory Limited in Vadodara is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Mahindra Finance Advisory Limited:
Mahindra Finance Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Finance Advisory Limited!
